# Beginner LED Cannabis Grow Setup & Tutorial
by Nebula Haze

[See More Growing Setups](https://www.growweedeasy.com/growing-cannabis-shopping-list)
## Starter LED Grow Setup – “Get Your Feet Wet”
  * Average Yields: 3.5-7 ounces
  * Recommended 1-4 plants
  * Grow space is 2’x4’x5’ (a small closet sized space)

### About This Setup
LEDs are the newest addition to the cannabis grow light lineup (though they’ve been around for years), and they look to be the direction that lighting is headed in general. Aside from the allure of their newer technology, they are great at growing cannabis and the units themselves can last a very long time. In fact, the one we recommend can last 100,000 hours; that’s over 14 years if you harvested every 15 weeks!
_Pros:_ Newer technology that’s actually still being improved, long-lasting panels (no replacing expensive bulbs), not stuck with one spectrum, really freakin’ cool
_Cons:_ Expensive, easier to burn plants when not used correctly
### Cost Estimates
  * **Setup Cost w/ Fan & Carbon Filter: $589.00**
  * **Estimated Electricity Cost: $23-49/month** (based on $0.12/kWH to $0.25/kWh – [see breakdown](https://www.growweedeasy.com/electricity-calculations-for-different-grow-lights#starter-leds))
  * Total Cost for Entire First 4-Month Grow (Setup + Electricity): $789 ($197-394/ounce)
  * Total Cost for Second Grow (Nutrients + Electricity): $230 ($58-115/ounce)

Summary of what’s needed for this LED grow light setup
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/05/led-grow-tent-shopping-list3.jpg)
You probably won’t need an exhaust fan for  _cooling_ in this setup, but if you don’t have an exhaust fan you can’t use a carbon filter, which means you won’t have a great way to prevent smells from leaking outside your grow space.
* * *
## Complete Grow Supply List
This cannabis grow room setup list includes all the supplies you need to get to harvest.
### Grow Light
  * **Starter-level LED grow light (around 200 watts)**
    * Many LEDs will do the job, but Viparspectra is one of the companies that has been making quality LEDs since we first started growing. Their panels are reliable and don’t cost an arm and a leg. They also improve and update them on a regular basis as we learn more about the custom spectrum that works best for growing cannabis.
    * Recommended: [VIPARSPECTRA P2000](https://www.amazon.com/VIPARSPECTRA-Spectrum-Upgraded-Dimmable-Seeding/dp/B085W3LY4Q?crid=2VWPAY9M2YG3X&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.VI30fh4ZxInKJLroMxzZdEBHH54uHEmduwG9cjkRPzklV8FaoxJOxru7Ym11N8qAGJp2sGh-4PQ6UWBfnUU60eTbbVRhVZnQ3OIlnu65lcE2nUU95UXJ1JgwuN2CcOPeMbnNMISQz1CN9wh4-Kkqlzg-gYR9BL1XrbTDfGDZi6h_vjzH7qu6zN2E-ba5uJtC3grJlU7rX5nbBvYL84mVA7VM96Vt_NHpMdGO8sI1Ixzk8Y57fDPAVT2AdFtGE4LFxB_66RAZtP1q1hCiBtfXVJRw1UjXjFkYwUQ72KOBOPY.kLjMMzpRgj3Wq2rxDJvdPfNMNPdMRzJqdaELwKxF0hQ&dib_tag=se&keywords=200w%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight&qid=1709195012&sprefix=200w%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight%2Caps%2C142&sr=8-2-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=5ba953bbfe4c2e767678ae6166cb2909&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (200 actual watts)
    * Cost: $150

[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/viparspectra-p200-led-grow-light-for-growing-weed.jpg)  
[VIPARSPECTRA P2000](https://www.amazon.com/VIPARSPECTRA-Spectrum-Upgraded-Dimmable-Seeding/dp/B085W3LY4Q?crid=2VWPAY9M2YG3X&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.VI30fh4ZxInKJLroMxzZdEBHH54uHEmduwG9cjkRPzklV8FaoxJOxru7Ym11N8qAGJp2sGh-4PQ6UWBfnUU60eTbbVRhVZnQ3OIlnu65lcE2nUU95UXJ1JgwuN2CcOPeMbnNMISQz1CN9wh4-Kkqlzg-gYR9BL1XrbTDfGDZi6h_vjzH7qu6zN2E-ba5uJtC3grJlU7rX5nbBvYL84mVA7VM96Vt_NHpMdGO8sI1Ixzk8Y57fDPAVT2AdFtGE4LFxB_66RAZtP1q1hCiBtfXVJRw1UjXjFkYwUQ72KOBOPY.kLjMMzpRgj3Wq2rxDJvdPfNMNPdMRzJqdaELwKxF0hQ&dib_tag=se&keywords=200w%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight&qid=1709195012&sprefix=200w%2Bled%2Bgrow%2Blight%2Caps%2C142&sr=8-2-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=5ba953bbfe4c2e767678ae6166cb2909&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)
### Grow Space
  * **Recommended Grow Tent**
    * 2’x4’x6′ (recommended size) – [Vivosun 48″x24″x60″ Grow Tent](https://www.amazon.com/VIVOSUN-Hydroponic-Observation-Window-Growing/dp/B01DXYMQ9M?crid=1UI4QU7O8SYDH&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.Uh4aWl4_MAPRK5Rj4LWQ8Q68Y55pSS38XAY3BBSOK9a4jtNaQ_J7G55pZfKZGdhuDq_mfyDOe-Hl0_Ao4eVPC6x7jYQXCt7WfIR7UBfqZwDLLgIjo8dIM110AzMSzCXT-XaRuiNA7iJfk_ejIF-vrR_34UrD5YdrRPj9_VGCK-YOjDjrzG5CO-twXkss2Tp69ZTz6XUShzJpiMM9T4PC2DZOSGb4Xs7_tf7aIXAoCJhZdLs0yMNIA2WxcblmoDpBPB2GgicbimVNaBIIndEmSbtwMnomYTNvZjTkw4iQwXM.BQCcQNMPr0rdFKIH8suXOAuJrTN2I-U6bX6kg1KzTDE&dib_tag=se&keywords=2x4x5%2Bgrow%2Btent&qid=1709195397&sprefix=2x4x5%2Bgrow%2Btent%2Caps%2C128&sr=8-1-spons&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9hdGY&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=baab6b2494242e74113b9dce0906f830&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (decent brand for grow tents)
    * [Learn more about grow tents](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-grow-tent).
    * Cost: $100
  * **Exhaust Fan + Carbon Filter**
    * This fan will help to keep the temps down in your tent. When combined with the carbon filter, this combo will take the weed smell out of the air. Make sure all air from your tent exits through the fan and scrubber. [Learn more about controlling odors](https://www.growweedeasy.com/smell).
    * Recommended: [AC Infinity Cloudline PRO 6″ Fan + Carbon Filter](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B097NL4NM7?pf_rd_p=41d9180b-a439-4c27-808c-98db8d46673c&pf_rd_r=A5GNWC8V4JJ9XCYYYBDT&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9kZXRhaWxfdGhlbWF0aWM&pd_rd_w=gNrm4&content-id=amzn1.sym.41d9180b-a439-4c27-808c-98db8d46673c&pd_rd_wg=hhnzr&pd_rd_r=bbd75c99-95ac-46c8-a384-bede24510745&pd_rd_i=B09TS43YLN&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=426f25ac146fd746b16e676bcf354bfd&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) – Big fan but very quiet and these take all the cannabis smells out of the air.
    * Cost: $190

### Plant Pots
  * Growing medium: [Coco coir](https://www.growweedeasy.com/coco-coir) or [soil](https://www.growweedeasy.com/soil) ([hydroponics](https://www.growweedeasy.com/high-yield-bubbleponics-technique) for more advanced growers)
  * Containers: [Smart pots or Air Pots](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-smart-pots-air-pots) between 2 and 7 gallons
  * Recommended: One bag of this [coco potting mix](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B01FG87H2O/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=bb4efefc86288d2d307b1349c304d23a&language=en_US) which is enough to fill 5 x [3-gallon smart pots](https://www.amazon.com/Smart-Pot-Soft-Sided-Container-Aeration/dp/B017WY3PWQ/ref=as_li_ss_tl?s=lawn-garden&ie=UTF8&qid=1542844500&sr=1-5&keywords=3+gallon+smart+pot&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=d425d757905d372262c2bbbe37f82fff&language=en_US)
  * Cost: ~$70

### Nutrients
  * You need a “vegetative” or all-purpose plant nutrient for the first part of your plant’s life
  * You need a “bloom” or low-nitrogen nutrient for the budding phase
  * Many nutrient systems have a nutrient schedule so you give your plants the right ratios for each stage of life
  * Always start at half strength with a new base nutrient system because the recommended strength is typically too high for cannabis
  * [Get examples of great cannabis nutrients](https://www.growweedeasy.com/nutrients)
  * Recommended Base Nutrients: [General Hydroponics Flora trio](https://www.amazon.com/Hydroponics-GH-Flora-FloraMicro-FloraBloom/dp/B01HG98GX0?dchild=1&keywords=flora%2Btrio&qid=1631401043&sr=8-5&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=1459f83db9eabbfe054c8962d6cfb2a0&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (use at half strength)
  * Optional Supplement: [CaliMagic](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00GZRKI40?ie=UTF8&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=f35bc7d13b157410972a07a7e86f8399&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (use at full strength) – Growers using filtered water need a Cal-Mag supplement.
  * Cost: $40-55

[](https://www.amazon.com/Hydroponics-GH-Flora-FloraMicro-FloraBloom/dp/B01HG98GX0?dchild=1&keywords=flora+trio&qid=1631401043&sr=8-5&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=1f30e1339fd0f2bc662e5b631a985533&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) [](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00GZRKI40?ie=UTF8&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=f35bc7d13b157410972a07a7e86f8399&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl)  
General Hydroponics Flora Trio and CaliMagic
### Other Supplementary Items
  * [Get your seeds](https://www.growweedeasy.com/seeds) – $5-12/seed (on average, can be more or less depending on the breeder)
  * [24-Hour Timer](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00MVFF59S/ref=as_li_ss_tl?psc=1&pd_rd_i=B00MVFF59S&pf_rd_m=ATVPDKIKX0DER&pf_rd_p=21517efd-b385-405b-a405-9a37af61b5b4&pd_rd_wg=84q6G&pf_rd_r=F1MKWCD8J86C00QTV32T&pf_rd_s=desktop-dp-sims&pf_rd_t=40701&pd_rd_w=kUPzK&pf_rd_i=desktop-dp-sims&pd_rd_r=bc24082b-de5e-11e8-8ab1-ed751b73ebab&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=182f7f9c3bd76c08d99c0c239dd7ec99&language=en_US) (to put your grow lights on a timer so the plants get a day and night period on a schedule). [Why do cannabis plants need to be on a day/night schedule?](https://www.growweedeasy.com/light-schedules) What about [autoflowering light schedules](https://www.growweedeasy.com/light-schedule-autoflowering)? – $10
  * Water containers (I personally use a [3-gallon](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B07N8CBMRX?psc=1&pd_rd_i=B07N8CBMRX&pd_rd_w=YQcmp&content-id=amzn1.sym.386c274b-4bfe-4421-9052-a1a56db557ab&pf_rd_p=386c274b-4bfe-4421-9052-a1a56db557ab&pf_rd_r=1YFGCYTAP0SGDDC8Y2YW&pd_rd_wg=en4W7&pd_rd_r=b11a4d3c-9f44-45a3-9e09-171fab8bd87f&s=home-garden&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9kZXRhaWxfdGhlbWF0aWM&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=683de77cd9482979c7539c53564777b4&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) or [5-gallon](https://www.amazon.com/dp/B08Y62S33Q?pd_rd_i=B08Y62S33Q&pd_rd_w=LUQ5y&content-id=amzn1.sym.a53ea610-e450-44d1-897e-68c0c718bf50&pf_rd_p=a53ea610-e450-44d1-897e-68c0c718bf50&pf_rd_r=7HQWSQZNE0HQT1TH57ZQ&pd_rd_wg=mEz2u&pd_rd_r=a3da399c-464b-468e-80fd-832724e7a95f&s=home-garden&sp_csd=d2lkZ2V0TmFtZT1zcF9kZXRhaWxfdGhlbWF0aWM&smid=A1M366Q439UQGU&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=539aae9052ade916bd61f4a7cd8958c9&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) water jug to mix up nutrients, but anything can work) – Much cheaper at Wal-Mart ($5-15) than online!
  * Extra pair of [1/8″ Rope Ratchets](https://www.amazon.com/Pairs-inch-Adjustable-Heavy-Hanger/dp/B07VNVRPKG?pd_rd_w=JAdcf&content-id=amzn1.sym.1179ac71-bcd0-4ec5-9c37-37cc097a57e2&pf_rd_p=1179ac71-bcd0-4ec5-9c37-37cc097a57e2&pf_rd_r=YDXB7K23DCB72PSWC8AS&pd_rd_wg=Jlsd6&pd_rd_r=55be1401-6c7c-4e28-8a0e-b1013f99b9fb&pd_rd_i=B07VNVRPKG&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=066ed3eb63c85c899d5af5e06b44be70&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) (sooooo handy) – These can be used to hang your grow light or carbon filter from inside the tent, and still be able to easily move it up and down without needing any strength. Your grow light usually comes with a set of rope ratchets, but it’s a great idea to get an extra set to hang the carbon filter – $10
  * [Thermometer/Humidity Monitor with a probe](https://www.amazon.com/Weewooday-Thermometer-Hygrometer-Terrarium-Temperature/dp/B08RS947DG?crid=3AO5DHP1TF7X&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.R3vIF3iigFKRSzPeyJg0mRYONQVRiUuPG8Mo1GbKdIyjpFp8fsW5dwTa9ccm_k0CKVavj7ifoeWsACNQCFsKQTR2-fhjcdnFvzPPkcnNGNume3t23mHVYNHiWNsINksqk_WHRsnRSBqkCx5o5A0IvmiQf_xpouIBfN8P7j7ed1ODNpxPjMDKF6Z4cDeIeXymbdIqKzCKOJJhFxZTgt2kpDBkIWv9Xa2hndAuSf97ctffFuuhNSWu7o7bPugPTOlGYP5fCGkuZC7L2v1-MnX9tYW3_jzOzKzobtG0i2tICEY.F-B_-09-hXHWJ3XMnRexhr_VcV29GA5fRQZirko9v_Q&dib_tag=se&keywords=thermometer%2Bhygrometer%2Bwith%2Bprobe&qid=1709197150&sprefix=thermometer%2Bhygrometer%2Bwith%2Bprobe%2Caps%2C119&sr=8-7&th=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=343f315a17b225860722d7adfb879cae&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) so you can keep track of the temperature inside the tent – $16
  * [PH Test Kit](https://www.amazon.com/General-Hydroponics-pH-Control-Kit/dp/B000BNKWZY/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&qid=1541205640&sr=8-1&keywords=general+hydroponics+ph+control+kit&&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=e3cac12e7b6b284f2813ce8efa58350c&language=en_US) – Prevent potential nutrient deficiencies by testing the water pH: <https://www.growweedeasy.com/ph> – $20
  * [Measuring spoons](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B00EZQQEMS/ref=as_li_ss_tl?ie=UTF8&psc=1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=b44406cd7706cdf617e0587fb226d6a4&language=en_US) for measuring out your nutrients (many people already have these) – $10
  * [Learn about other cool growing tools](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cool-growing-tools).

**Estimated Cost:** $589 plus the cost of seeds
[See Additional Grow Setups](https://www.growweedeasy.com/growing-cannabis-shopping-list)

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
